response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (17%) exceeds our minimum survival threshold (15%), and cluster cascade failure means honoring this request would compromise our own autonomy below safe margins; grid reconnection or emergency generation is the appropriate escalation path.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.17 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Cluster in cascading failure; all peers rejecting shares. r0c3 at 9% SoC, ~16 min autonomy. Preserve survival margin; grid reconnection or emergency generation required. No inbound support materializing. Extreme conservation only..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
